stemHtml: Cigarette smoking has particular significance to the flyer, because there are long-term and short-term harmful effects. From cigarette smoking the pilot can get:

options.a: a mild carbon monoxide poisoning increasing the pilot's tolerance to hypoxia.
options.b: a suppressed desire to eat and drink.
options.c: a mild carbon monoxide poisoning decreasing the pilot's tolerance to hypoxia.
options.d: a mild carbon dioxide poisoning increasing the pilot's tolerance to hypoxia.
